subject: Weekly digest: persian track in Perth | Frida Kahlo | Q4 review | INIT-4269
body: Following yesterday's call, the persian effort in Perth needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla seems to disagree with Frida Kahlo on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-4269. Escalate blockers directly if they affect delivery this week. Tracking tags: readiness, delivery.
